steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a similarity between mass fraction and mole fraction. The notes state that both measures indicate the relative abundance of chromium on Earth — one using total mass, the other using total atom count. The correct choice must capture that shared purpose.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: fails to identify any connection between the two measures. ✗
  • Choice B — both indicate the relative abundance of elements on Earth: directly matches what the notes say both measures reveal. ✓
  • Choice C: misdefines mole fraction by conflating it with mass fraction. ✗
  • Choice D: emphasizes a difference between the two rather than a similarity. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
